prompt:
Goal: Create a warm minimalist interior design collage celebrating clean design, smooth forms, natural textures, and functional elegance, with a calm organic luxury mood.

Canvas: A 4:3 horizontal image divided into exactly 4 equal rectangular panels in a 2x2 grid, separated by thin white gutters. Use soft natural daylight, beige plaster walls, warm wood, cream upholstery, woven rugs, olive greenery, and a serene editorial photography style.

Visual style: Photorealistic high-end interior photography, neutral earthy palette, Japandi and organic modern influence, rounded forms, tactile materials, matte finishes, subtle shadows, no people, no visible branding, no text.

Panel 1, top left living room: Show a cozy living room with exactly 1 curved cream bouclé sofa, 1 round low wooden coffee table, 1 large potted olive tree on the left, 1 framed abstract beige artwork centered above the sofa, 1 arched brass floor lamp with a woven shade on the right, 1 small ceramic vase with greenery on the coffee table, 1 shallow wooden bowl on stacked books, and 1 woven natural rug. Include an arched doorway in the back right with dim shelves beyond it.

Panel 2, top right kitchen: Show a refined kitchen with exactly 1 pale stone island with vertical fluted wood front, exactly 3 wooden bar stools, exactly 2 dome pendant lamps hanging above, 1 tall window or glass door on the left with leafy outdoor greenery, 1 white vase filled with branches on the island, 1 bowl of green fruit, 1 black faucet and cooktop, and a slim floating shelf on the back wall with minimal ceramics and a small framed landscape print.

Panel 3, bottom left bedroom: Show a tranquil bedroom with exactly 1 low wooden bed frame, cream bedding, exactly 4 visible pillows, 1 olive green throw blanket draped across the bed, 1 wooden nightstand on the left, 1 rounded beige table lamp, 1 framed delicate botanical artwork above the bed, 1 small vase with leafy stems near the window, 1 large floor-to-ceiling window on the right, and a woven rug under the bed.

Panel 4, bottom right bathroom: Show a spa-like bathroom with exactly 1 freestanding oval cream stone bathtub, 1 white towel draped over the tub rim, 1 recessed illuminated wall niche holding minimal bottles, bowl, and plant, 1 wall-mounted black faucet with two knobs, 1 small round wooden side table with ceramics, 1 large potted olive tree near the right window, and 1 round woven rug in the foreground.

Customizable direction: Maintain the overall aesthetic as warm organic modern Japandi minimalism, use cream, beige, warm oak, olive green, and soft taupe, set the lighting to soft natural morning daylight, keep the material focus on bouclé, plaster, oak wood, stone, linen, ceramic, and woven fiber, and make the space feel calm, warm, elegant, and quietly luxurious.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 panels and the specified object counts, keep the composition clean and uncluttered, avoid saturated colors, avoid harsh contrast, avoid people, pets, logos, captions, and extra decorative clutter.
